no: Coran BG2 Adds Coran the CG Male Elf Fighter/Thief to BG2 as a recruitable companion.Install Coran for BG2 before Mazzy Megamod and Detective’s Guild of Athkatla.

conflicts.reason: RE's Coran encounter extends C6CORAN dialogue (vanilla Ch6 cameo). Coran NPC mod replaces C6CORAN entirely, making the extension point invalid
Choose one Coran in BG2. Standalone Coran (by Domi/PPG) is more feature-rich with full romance and quest content. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Coran if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Coran.cre, 2026-03

sum: Continues Coran's story into BG2/ToB as a joinable NPC with new quests, banters, and romance content.

co.n: Coran NPC MOD for Baldur's Gate II
co.tp2n: Coran NPC MOD for Baldur's Gate II

co.n: Delete old Coran from the Forest of Tethyr (RECOMMENDED)
co.tp2n: Delete old Coran from the Forest of Tethyr (RECOMMENDED)
